chunks.text: Elad Alon is an Adjunct Professor at 519 Cory Hall with email elad@eecs.berkeley.edu and phone 510-642-0237. His research interests include Integrated Circuits (INC), Design, Modeling and Analysis (DMA), Information, Data, Network, and Communication Sciences (IDNCS), and Computer Architecture & Engineering (ARC). He earned his Ph.D. in Electrical Engineering from Stanford University in 2006, with earlier degrees from Stanford. Office hours are Tu. 2:30-3:30pm at 519 Cory.
chunks.question: What are Elad Alon's research interests?

chunks.text: Venkat Anantharam is a Professor at 271 Cory Hall with email ananth@eecs.berkeley.edu and phone 510-643-8435. His research interests include Information, Data, Network, and Communication Sciences (IDNCS), Artificial Intelligence (AI), Control, Intelligent Systems, and Robotics (CIR), Security (SEC), and Signal Processing (SP). He earned his Ph.D. in Electrical Engineering from UC Berkeley in 1986, with multiple degrees from UC Berkeley and IIT. Office hours vary by week, and assistants include Kim Kail.
chunks.question: Where does Venkat Anantharam hold his office?

chunks.text: Gopala Krishna Anumanchipalli is an Assistant Professor at 490A Cory Hall with email gopala@berkeley.edu. His research interests include Artificial Intelligence (AI), Biosystems & Computational Biology (BIO), Signal Processing (SP), and Human-Computer Interaction (HCI). He earned dual Ph.D.s from Instituto Superior Técnico and Carnegie Mellon University in 2013, with a B.Tech and M.S. from IIIT Hyderabad. Office hours are 2:30-4:30PM at 490A Cory.
chunks.question: What degrees does Gopala Anumanchipalli hold?
chunks.answer: Dual Ph.D.s from Técnico and Carnegie Mellon.

chunks.text: Murat Arcak is a Professor at 569 Cory Hall with email arcak@berkeley.edu. His research interests include Control, Intelligent Systems, and Robotics (CIR), Cyber-Physical Systems and Design Automation (CPSDA), Biosystems & Computational Biology (BIO), and Power and Energy (ENE). He earned his Ph.D. in Electrical Engineering from UC Santa Barbara in 2000, with earlier degrees from UC Santa Barbara and Bogazici University.
chunks.question: What is Murat Arcak's research focus?

chunks.text: Ana Claudia Arias is a Professor and EE Division Chair at 501 Cory Hall with email acarias@eecs.berkeley.edu and phone 510-642-1728. Her research interests include Physical Electronics (PHY) and Power and Energy (ENE). She earned her Ph.D. in Physics from the University of Cambridge in 2001, with earlier degrees from Federal University of Paraná. Office hours are by appointment at 508 Cory, with assistant Alex Sandoval.
chunks.question: What role does Ana Claudia Arias hold?
chunks.answer: EE Division Chair at UC Berkeley.

chunks.text: Babak Ayazifar is a Teaching Professor at 517 Cory Hall with email ayazifar@berkeley.edu and phone 510-642-9945. His research interests include Education (EDUC) and Signal Processing (SP). He earned his Ph.D. in Electrical Engineering and Computer Science from MIT in 2003, with a B.S. from Caltech. Teaching schedule includes EECS 16A and EE 120 in Spring 2026.
chunks.question: What does Babak Ayazifar teach in Spring 2026?

chunks.text: Ruzena Bajcsy is a Professor Emerita at 719 Sutardja Dai Hall with email bajcsy@seas.upenn.edu and phone 510-642-9423. Her research interests include Artificial Intelligence (AI), Biosystems & Computational Biology (BIO), Control, Intelligent Systems, and Robotics (CIR), Graphics (GR), Human-Computer Interaction (HCI), and Security (SEC). She earned Ph.D.s from Stanford and Slovak Technical University. Office hours are M W 9-10 at 719 Sutardja Dai.
chunks.question: Where is Ruzena Bajcsy's office located?
chunks.answer: 719 Sutardja Dai Hall at UC Berkeley.

chunks.text: Alexandre Bayen is a Professor with email bayen@berkeley.edu. His research interests include Control, Intelligent Systems, and Robotics (CIR), Artificial Intelligence (AI), and Cyber-Physical Systems and Design Automation (CPSDA). He earned his Ph.D. in Aeronautics and Astronautics from Stanford University in 2003, with earlier degrees from Stanford and Ecole Polytechnique.
chunks.question: What is Alexandre Bayen's educational background?

chunks.text: Jessica Boles is an Assistant Professor with email boles@berkeley.edu. Her research interests include Power and Energy (ENE), Integrated Circuits (INC), Micro/Nano Electro Mechanical Systems (MEMS), and Physical Electronics (PHY). She earned her Ph.D. in Electrical Engineering from MIT in 2022. Teaching schedule includes EE 113B and EE 213B in Spring 2026.
chunks.question: What does Jessica Boles research?

chunks.text: Duncan Callaway is an Associate Professor at 419 Sutardja Dai Hall with email dcal@berkeley.edu. His research interest is Power and Energy (ENE). He earned his Ph.D. in Theoretical & Applied Mechanics from Cornell University in 2001, with a B.S. from University of Rochester. Office hours require signing up at a website.
chunks.question: What is Duncan Callaway's primary research area?
